hero.subtitle: Web Developer • Web creator
about.title: About Me
about.left.page1:
I am a third-year student at Adam Mickiewicz University in Poznań, passionate about web design, application development and artificial intelligence.

My student journey is complemented by hands-on experience gained during internships and work in the tech industry. During an internship at M3 Group I worked as a web designer (WordPress) and app designer using FlutterFlow, honing my skills in building user-friendly and responsive web solutions.
about.left.page2: I currently serve as a administrator and web designer for EDU-CZAR and DermaExpert. In these roles I manage and develop their websites, ensuring functionality, visual appeal and usability.
about.left.page3:
I continually expand my knowledge and take on new challenges in technology and design. My projects focus on creating intuitive user interfaces and modern web solutions.

With experience and certifications such as Fundamentals of Accelerated Computing with CUDA Python, Fundamentals of Deep Learning and Generative AI with Diffusion Models, I am prepared to take the next steps in my career.
about.right.title: A bit more about me...
about.right.page1: Outside of work, I am personally interested in artificial intelligence and have been exploring AI tools for several years. I also create digital materials using tools like FL Studio, Adobe Premiere Pro and GIMP.
about.right.page2: In my free time I also enjoy video games and movies, which help me relax and draw visual and conceptual inspirations for my projects.

experience.items.2023.org: Website admin • Web designer • Graphic designer
experience.items.2023.body:
EDU-CZAR (2023 – Nov 2025)
Website Administrator, Web Designer, Graphic Designer

Delivered an end-to-end process of building and administering a WordPress website, tailored to the organization's educational and communication needs — friendly for both children and parents.

Scope: content updates, publishing new posts.
https://educzar.pl/

DermaExpert (2023 – present)
Website Administrator, Web Designer

Built a complete WordPress website from scratch, including information architecture and layout, plus visual elements and content tailored to the dermatology industry. Focused on a responsive and intuitive user interface.
https://dermaexpert.pl/
experience.items.2024.org: Website admin • Web designer • Graphic designer • App designer
experience.items.2024.body:
(May 2024 – Jul 2024)
Website Administrator, Web Designer, App Designer, Graphic Designer

Created graphic designs and worked on UI development for e-commerce platforms using WordPress (Elementor, WPBakery) and additional plugins (e.g. social media feed, pop-up content, RSS feed).

Ensured responsive web layouts and designed applications for Windows, Linux, Android and iOS.
https://wodnasluzbaratownicza.pl/
https://www.eksero24.pl/
experience.items.2025.body:
(Sep 2025 – present)
Developer

Working with M3 Group team as a developer, focusing on web applications and systems development. Working on projects using modern web technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript and other development tools.

PRI System — UI & modules
Team project (engineering thesis)

Modernizing an existing system UI, delivering new modules (project marketplace, statistics) and a custom translation system that improves flexibility for hard-to-reach and dynamic texts.
